findings.title: Per-authorization fee is above competitive benchmark

componentImpactEstimate.basis: Annualized savings from reducing processor per-authorization pricing to the competitive benchmark target.

evidence: The dominant per-authorization fee is $0.10 across 1,800 authorization(s). For a merchant processing approximately $675,614/year, competitive per-auth pricing is $0.05 to $0.08. Reducing from $0.10 to $0.08 would create a component impact of approximately $36.00/month ($432.00/year). Visible rate groups: Non-Amex per-auth: $0.10 (1,800 auths); Non-Amex per-auth: $0.00 (400 auths); Non-Amex per-auth: $0.01 (185 auths); Amex per-auth: $0.08 (63 auths); Non-Amex per-auth: $0.02 (28 auths).
